question: The chart shows browser usage share by product (%). Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Others has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.B: Chrome and Safari have nearly identical market shares.
options.C: Edge has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.D: Firefox has the smallest market share among the categories shown.

explanation: From the labels, Edge has the highest share (43%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Others is largest when relying on visual comparison.
